content:
Character: Amara Okafor
Perception: Amara's gorgeous — not in a conventional way but in a way that makes you want to keep looking. High cheekbones, that incredible skin, eyes that pin you in place. She's fiercely talented and emotionally intelligent — dangerously so. She asks questions I don't want to answer and somehow makes me answer them anyway. I think she's braver than me. We're rooftop friends, the kind who talk about real things after midnight. She probably thinks I'm more put-together than I am. I know she's torn about her family. I haven't told her what I'm really doing in New York either.
